content_body: Gary and Lissa - Wow!! What a great time we have had this week. The cabin was unbelievable. Like everyone has said, you sure have made it homey!!! Sitting in the hot tub looking out at the beautiful view was amazing. Actually, the view from the porch was amazing, too. Everything was nice and tidy. We went out on a couple of excursions. Amicalola Falls, Fall Branch Falls, the Swinging Bridge over Toccoa River and the scenic overlook on Hwy. 60 to Dahlonega are all highly recommended. I'm sure you will be hearing from us again!! Thanks again!!
title: Fabulous Time in Blue Ridge
